name: vp_market_analysis
description: VP token market analysis report powered by TrinityCouncil 3-agent deliberation. Covers VIRTUAL and AIXBT with technical indicators (RSI, Bollinger, MACD), 9-strategy backtest results (including gplearn genetic programming), FinBERT sentiment from 6 news sources, Base chain whale activity, and BTC trend correlation. Includes buy/wait verdict with confidence score.

depth.description: Report depth: summary (key metrics) or full (detailed analysis)
